summary: Solid soundboard recording with strong crowd energy and a good 1987 second set, though overall sentiment is mixed due to limited feedback
review: The reviewers praise the clear board source and vibrant audience presence, noting solid playing and an interesting drums‑>space segment that makes this East Coast Fall ’87 show stand out. While one reviewer rates it highly for its quality, another provides only a terse negative comment, resulting in mixed overall sentiment.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments about the soundboard and performance are balanced by an uninformative low‑star review; with limited data the rating reflects a good but not exceptional show and recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best quality among available sources, crisp board sound with strong crowd presence; no major noise issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic second set typical of the Fall ’87 East Coast run, highlighted by an engaging drums→space segment and solid overall playing.
